introSection: EpiQ Coaster is a steel launched roller coaster located at Doha Quest in Doha, Doha, Qatar. Built by Premier Rides, the ride features a backwards launch up a vertical, twisting tall spike rising above the shopping center in a climate-controlled environment.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.

fullText:
EpiQ Coaster is a steel launched roller coaster located at Doha Quest in Doha, Doha, Qatar. Built by Premier Rides, the ride features a backwards launch up a vertical, twisting tall spike rising above the shopping center in a climate-controlled environment.



2 trains with 2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.
